posts.author: durr (Mrinal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

We have created a webhook which sends data whenever a button is clicked. However, we would like the webhook to capture information of the person who clicks the button and right now it is defaulting to one userID. The person who set up our Monday account, board etc.

Is there any way around this?

Thanks
